name: sts2-ai-agent-portable
description: LLM-first Slay the Spire 2 AI agent with local scaffold, memory, collector, and MCP/REST integration.

scripts.agent:run:bridge: STS2_LLM_COMMAND="node scripts/llm-bridge-decider.mjs" STS2_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 STS2_LLM_BRIDGE_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 tsx src/agent/index.ts run
scripts.agent:run:deepseek-combat-live: STS2_P8_LIVE_ADDITIVE=1 STS2_P8_LIVE_DECISION_CLASSES=combat:llm_required STS2_LLM_COMMAND="tsx src/agent/deepseekLiveCommand.ts" STS2_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS=45000 tsx src/agent/index.ts run
scripts.agent:run:deepseek-broad-live: STS2_P8_LIVE_ADDITIVE=1 STS2_P8_LIVE_DECISION_CLASSES=combat:llm_required,card_reward:llm_required,map:llm_required,rest:llm_required,shop:llm_required,event:llm_required,card_select:local_recommended_llm_arbitrate STS2_LLM_COMMAND="tsx src/agent/deepseekLiveCommand.ts" STS2_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS=45000 tsx src/agent/index.ts run
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run agent:smoke
